intro: Between 12 and 26 April 2026, ZCyberNews covered 17 credential-theft incidents, with APT41, CrystalX, and Omnistealer among the most active threat actors. The critical CVE-2026-33829 was highlighted in these reports. Affected sectors included technology, software development, cloud services, and government, with impacts observed globally and specifically in Bangladesh, Europe, North America, and South Asia. The severity mix comprised 12 high, 3 critical, 1 medium, and 1 informational rating.
